gateTitle: SOG Promotion Required For Generated Implementation
purpose: Block promotion of generated implementation artifacts to durable product truth until equivalent behavior is represented and evidenced as a Semantic Operation Graph.
passConditions: generated implementation is classified as proof_surface_only
blockConditions: durable product truth is claimed before SOG exists
generated implementation is promoted directly from green receipt
semantic operation graph path is missing
promotionStatus is accepted without SOG parity evidence
completionPosture: Green proof is reviewable, but durable promotion is blocked until SOG parity evidence exists.
